notes.text: M5 Library / Records Room (Records Alcove behind panel)
M8 South Service Gate (Sarth's entry route)

blooming-rot-2.wallNote: Walls and lights are a structural starting set. Refine in Foundry's wall editor for fine work — it's faster than JSON for tweaks.
blooming-rot-2.wallStrategy: Outer perimeter + east wing divider + west service divider + courtyard 3-walls. Doors at front, courtyard south gate, kitchen alley, west-service interior. Furniture, alcoves, and inner nooks intentionally left open per directive.
